zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Vere於1235年出生時，她的父親Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford28歲，母親Countess Hawise de Quincy51歲。她於大約1249年10月6日與Sir John de Courtenay結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1299年8月11日享年64歲，埋葬在英國戴文艾可謝特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Vere于1235年出生时，她的父亲Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford28岁，母亲Countess Hawise de Quincy51岁。她于大约1249年10月6日与Sir John de Courtenay结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1299年8月11日享年64岁，埋葬在英国戴文艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Vere was born in 1235, her father, Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford, was 28 and her mother, Countess Hawise de Quincy, was 51. She married Sir John de Courtenay about 6 October 1249. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 11 August 1299, at the age of 64, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Vere est née en 1235, son père, Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Countess Hawise de Quincy, avait 51 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Courtenay environ 6 octobre 1249. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 août 1299, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Vere 1235 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford 28 und ihre Mutter Countess Hawise de Quincy 51. Sie hat um 6. Oktober 1249 Sir John de Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. August 1299 im Alter von 64 Jahren und wurde in Exeter, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Vere è nata il nel 1235, sua padre, Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Countess Hawise de Quincy, aveva 51 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Courtenay circa 6 ottobre 1249. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 agosto 1299, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Exeter, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Vereが1235年に生まれた時，父Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxfordは28歳，母Countess Hawise de Quincyは51歳であった。約1249年10月6日にSir John de Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1299年8月11日に64歳で死去し，イギリスデボンエクセターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Vere(이)가 1235년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Hawise de Quincy(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 대략 1249년 10월 6일 Sir John de Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1299년 8월 11일 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Vere nasceu em 1235, seu pai, Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Countess Hawise de Quincy, tinha 51 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Courtenay aproximadamente 6 de outubro de 1249. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 11 de agosto de 1299, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Vere родилась в 1235 г., её отцу по имени Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Hawise de Quincy, 51. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Courtenay около 6 октября 1249 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 августа 1299 г. в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности эксетир, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Vere nació en 1235, su papá, Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Countess Hawise de Quincy, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Sir John de Courtenay aproximadamente 6 de octubre de 1249. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de agosto de 1299, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.
